title: jatropha pusilla
intro: Jatropha pusilla, also known as the small jatropha or dwarf coraljangle, is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Jatropha pusilla include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and insect repellent. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
